message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Chern-Simons Dynamics and the Quantum Hall Effect] \
  Source-backed arXiv sample
])

= Extracted Lists

The list environments below are extracted from arXiv LaTeX source and wrapped for pdfLaTeX validation.

+ For reviews of QHE, see, "The Quantum Hall Effect", edited by R.E. Prange and S. Girvin (Springer-Verlag, New York, 1987); G. Morandi, "Quantum Hall Effect" (Bibliopolis, Napoli, 1988); A.P. Balachandran, E. Ercolessi, G. Morandi and A.M. Srivastava, " The Hubbard Model and Anyon Superconductivity", Int. J. Mod. Phys. B4 (1990) 2057 and Lecture Notes in Physics, Volume 38 (World Scientific, Singapore, 1990); F. Wilczek, "Fractional Statistics and Anyon Superconductivity" (World Scientific, Singapore, 1990) and articles therein. See also ref. 2.

+ T. Chakraborty and P. Pietiläinen, "The Fractional Quantum Hall Effect", (Springer-Verlag, Berlin, 1988).

+ S.C. Jhang, T.H. Hansson and S. Kivelson, Phys. Rev. Lett. 62 (1989) 82; B. Blok and X.G. Wen, Institute for Advanced Study preprint IASSNS -HEP - 90/23 (1990).

+ J. Fröhlich and T. Kerler, Nucl. Phys. B 354 (1991) 369; J. Fröhlich and A. Zee, Institute for Theoretical Physics, Santa Barbara preprint NSF-ITP-91-31 (1991).

+ B.I. Halperin, Phys. Rev. B25 (1982) 2185.

+ A.P. Balachandran, G. Bimonte, K.S. Gupta and A. Stern, Syracuse University preprints SU-4228-477 and 487 (1991).

+ E. Witten, Commun. Math. Phys. 121 (1989) 351.

+ For a review, see P. Goddard and D. Olive, Int. J. Mod. Phys. A1 (1986) 303.

+ Cf. A.P. Balachandran, G. Marmo, B.-S. Skagerstam and A. Stern, "Classical Topology and Quantum States" (World Scientific, Singapore, 1991), Part I.

+ E. Witten, Nucl. Phys. B311 (1988) 46.
